patient_summary: 73-year-old female (patient name Olivia) with documented diagnosis of hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Medication refill request for Atorvastatin is documented. Notable laboratory findings include GLUCOSE 199 (H) on 01/11/2021, creatinine 1.1 (H) on 01/11/2021, sodium 134 (L) on 01/11/2021, and GFR 50 (A) on 01/11/2021. Lipid panel from 07/17/2020 shows CHOLTOTAL 136, TG 101, HDLCHOL 38 (L), LDLCHOL 78. History includes MRSA (R breast) with dates noted and COVID-19 with comment "recovered" and dates noted. Multiple upcoming encounters are listed in 2025 including primary care and hematology/oncology visits and an ancillary procedure at LGH KISSEL HILL. Functional limitations include difficulty walking, dressing/bathing, and doing errands alone. Multiple care team members and specialists are listed, including PCP Hershey, Curtis L, MD and endocrinology Pradhan Shrestha, Deepika, MD.
